title: cynosurus elegans subsp. obliquatus
intro: Cynosurus elegans subsp. obliquatus, also known as the Wood Grass, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Wood Grass include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Wood Grass is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or dried as a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
